  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a science fiction tank combat board game.",
      "It is a two-player science-fiction tank wargame.",
      "It is a microgame."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has six 4\"x7\" full-color geomorphic maps.",
      "It has 154 counters in three colors.",
      "It has two six-sided dice.",
      "It has an information sheet.",
      "It has a 24-page book containing rules and scenarios."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by geomorphic maps that can be combined to provide many different configurations.",
      "It is characterized by maps that display five different colors of terrain.",
      "It is characterized by counters representing vehicles or infantry.",
      "It is characterized by counters representing fighters, tanks, cities and forts.",
      "It is characterized by a gameplay mechanic where Electronic Warfare (EW) rating is used for firing.",
      "It is characterized by a combat resolution system using a Combat Result Table (CRT).",
      "It is characterized by victory conditions that vary from scenario to scenario.",
      "It is characterized by a small box packaging."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for tank combat.",
      "It is used for playing as the forces of the Lerlam Empire.",
      "It is used for playing as the rebels of the Panumatic League.",
      "It is used for simulating battles with units and terrain.",
      "It is used for resolving combat using dice rolls and a CRT."
    ],

      "It is located in a small box."

      "It is known for its unique Electronic Warfare (EW) mechanic for firing.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それはSFタンク戦闘ボードゲームです。",
      "それは二人用SFタンクウォーゲームです。",
      "それはミクロゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは6枚の4\"x7\"フルカラーのジオモルフィックマップを持っています。",
      "それは3色で154個のカウンターを持っています。",
      "それは2個の6面ダイスを持っています。",
      "それは情報シートを持っています。",
      "それはルールとシナリオを含む24ページの冊子を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは、多くの異なる構成を提供するために組み合わせることができるジオモルフィックマップを特徴としています。",
      "それは、5つの異なる色の地形を表示するマップを特徴としています。",
      "それは、車両または歩兵を表すカウンターを特徴としています。",
      "それは、戦闘機、戦車、都市、砦を表すカウンターを特徴としています。",
      "それは、発砲に電子戦（EW）レーティングが使用されるゲームプレイメカニズムを特徴としています。",
      "それは、戦闘結果表（CRT）を使用した戦闘解決システムを特徴としています。",
      "それは、シナリオごとに勝利条件が異なることを特徴としています。",
      "それは、小さな箱のパッケージを特徴としています。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはタンク戦闘に使用されます。",
      "それはラーラム帝国の軍隊としてプレイするために使用されます。",
      "それはパヌマティック連盟の反乱軍としてプレイするために使用されます。",
      "それはユニットと地形を使った戦闘のシミュレーションに使用されます。",
      "それはダイスロールとCRTを使用した戦闘解決に使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それは小さな箱の中にあります。"
    ],

      "それは2個の6面ダイスで構成されています。",
      "それは情報シートで構成されています。",
      "それはルールとシナリオを含む24ページの冊子で構成されています。"

      "それは、戦闘が非常にスムーズに進むことを可能にする合理化されたメカニズムで知られています。",
      "それは、装甲ユニットの多様性で知られています。",

IsA: It is a science fiction tank combat board game.
It is a two-player science-fiction tank wargame.
HasA: It has six 4"x7" full-color geomorphic maps.
It has 154 counters in three colors.
It has a 24-page book containing rules and scenarios.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by geomorphic maps that can be combined to provide many different configurations.
It is characterized by maps that display five different colors of terrain.
It is characterized by counters representing vehicles or infantry.
It is characterized by counters representing fighters, tanks, cities and forts.
It is characterized by a gameplay mechanic where Electronic Warfare (EW) rating is used for firing.
It is characterized by a combat resolution system using a Combat Result Table (CRT).
It is characterized by victory conditions that vary from scenario to scenario.
It is characterized by a small box packaging.
UsedFor: It is used for tank combat.
It is used for playing as the forces of the Lerlam Empire.
It is used for playing as the rebels of the Panumatic League.
It is used for simulating battles with units and terrain.
It is used for resolving combat using dice rolls and a CRT.
LocatedIn: It is located in a small box.
CreatedBy: It was created by Arnold Hendrick.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Arnold Hendrick.
PublishedIn: It was published in The Space Gamer (No. 55).
WrittenBy: It was written by Arnold Hendrick.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Heritage Models.
ConsistsOf: It consists of six 4"x7" full-color geomorphic maps.
It consists of 154 counters in three colors.
It consists of two six-sided dice.
It consists of an information sheet.
It consists of a 24-page book containing rules and scenarios.
PartOf: It is part of the Dwarfstar Games line.
KnownFor: It is known for its unique Electronic Warfare (EW) mechanic for firing.
It is known for its streamlined mechanics that allow battles to flow smoothly.
It is known for the diversity of its armored units.
It is known for excellent value for the money.
It is known for being a solid, well thought out, and quite playable game.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Heritage Models.
It is associated with Arnold Hendrick.
It is associated with David Helber.
It is associated with Tom Maxwell.
It is associated with Bob Depew.
It is associated with the Lerlam Empire.
It is associated with the Panumatic League.
It is associated with the Charles S. Roberts Award.
About: It is about tank combat between the Lerlam Empire and the Panumatic League.
It is about futuristic tank games.
It is about simulating battles with units, terrain, and electronic warfare.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by other wargames.
It was influenced by the need for streamlined mechanics.
It was influenced by the desire for a detailed simulation.
